## TripperMate release

Download the **APK** attached below and sideload on your Android phone (arm64).

### Install
1. Download `TripperMate-v*.apk`
2. Allow **Install unknown apps** when prompted
3. Open TripperMate → share a destination from Google Maps → **Send to Dash**

### Supported bikes
Royal Enfield with **Tripper dash** and `RE_*` Wi‑Fi (Himalayan 450, Guerrilla 450, Scram 411, and more).

Built by [GitHub Actions](https://github.com/nitin-rachabathuni/TripperMate/actions) — see commit history for changes.
